title: TELOS authorization protocol — seats, enforcement, and the human authority boundary

authority.vocabulary: docs/mythological-vocabulary.md#TELOS (governs review, evidence, authorization, and execution boundaries)

advisory_rule: advisory seats are never gate-required — a missing XAI/GEMINI key never blocks authorization

signed_mode.rule: each required seat's packet must verify under its per-seat HMAC secret AND carry real provenance (server-issued response id, or agy's content-addressed attestation); a placeholder id, a missing id, or a response_id shared across two seats blocks

dissent_rule: any required seat with decision !== 'approve' or a non-empty required_edits list blocks authorization — one dissent outweighs any convergence (authz-007 is the preserved precedent)
ground_truth: disk — the gate re-reads artifacts and re-verifies evidence; a seat's self-reported status never satisfies the gate
human_boundary: TELOS authorization is a MODEL council outcome; implementation authority is THE EYE's and cannot be delegated to a model or inferred from consensus or silence
why: The protocol separates three things a model will otherwise conflate: maturation (Daedalus), authorization (this protocol), and human authority (The Eye). Each is checkable: the roster from planSeats, the enforcement from the signed-mode gate tests, the boundary from the preserved refusal records.
change_rule: Changing the required trio, advisory set, or enforcement rules is a trust-model change: Eye ruling -> Daedalus delta -> TELOS re-authorization (docs/institutional-memory/CHANGE-PROTOCOL.md); this contract must be updated in the same change or verify-contracts fails.

oracle.test: build-gate/scripts/test-trust.mjs (signed-mode signature+provenance blockers); build-gate/scripts/test-gate.mjs (missing-packet + required-edits blockers); build-gate/scripts/test-council-orchestrator.mjs
oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (probes planSeats roster; cross-checks CURRENT-AUTHORITY.required_seats; asserts the recorded authz-008 pass enforced signature+provenance and the recorded authz-007 block carries the codex-revise dissent)
